objective: Implement the next bounded PM entity write lane by adding create and update contracts, minimal mutation services, and POST/PATCH endpoints for `work.progress_snapshots` only, reusing the proven project, work-package, task, assignment, dependency, and execution-issue write validation posture for intra-work and identity references while adding merged validation for `project_id`, `work_package_id`, `task_id`, `supersedes_snapshot_id`, and `approved_by` plus bounded enum handling for `SnapshotStatus`, without changing database schema or broadening PM mutation scope.
constrained_outputs: Create and update schemas for `work.progress_snapshots` only, increasing the work schema registry from 20 to 22 entries
Minimal mutation-service and router wiring for `POST /api/v1/work/progress-snapshots` and `PATCH /api/v1/work/progress-snapshots/{progress_snapshot_id}` only

Merged foreign-key validation for `project_id`, `work_package_id`, `task_id`, `supersedes_snapshot_id`, and `approved_by` using the existing `OrgValidationError` 422 response shape, plus bounded enum handling for `SnapshotStatus` and 404 behavior for missing progress snapshots

Focused regression evidence proving packet-010a, packet-010b, packet-011f, packet-013, packet-013i, packet-013j, packet-014, packet-014i, packet-015, packet-015i, packet-016, and packet-017 surfaces remain intact after the minimal progress-snapshot write addition

Confirm create and update contracts for progress snapshots reuse the existing model and enum surface where possible and raise the work schema registry from 20 to 22 entries only

Confirm the live write surface merges bad `project_id`, `work_package_id`, `task_id`, `supersedes_snapshot_id`, and `approved_by` validation into the existing `OrgValidationError` 422 response shape and preserves 404 behavior for a missing progress snapshot

Confirm packet-010a model tests, packet-010b API tests, packet-011f project-write tests, packet-013 work-package write tests, packet-013i work-package integration smoke, packet-013j response enrichment tests, packet-014 task-write tests, packet-014i task integration smoke, packet-015 assignment-write tests, packet-015i assignment integration smoke, packet-016 dependency-write tests, and packet-017 execution-issue write tests still pass or skip as expected after the progress-snapshot write addition
